startPoint.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny at the Eastertime Fete by the Lumbridge Crater.
startPoint.es: Habla con el Easter Bunny en la Eastertime Fete, junto al Lumbridge Crater.

rewards.name: Bunny-hop
rewards.display: Bunny-hop, Around the World in Eggty Days, Invoke Spring, Butterfly Dervish, Cabbage Facepunch Bonanza, Egg Juggler, Easter Trick or Treat, Human to Bunny emote variant of the Easter Trick or Treat emote (if not unlocked previously)

text.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny in the Lumbridge Crater to start the quest.
text.es: Habla con el Easter Bunny en el Lumbridge Crater para comenzar la misión.

text.en: Talk to the Cooks' Guild Apprentice, just north of the Easter Bunny.
text.es: Habla con el Cooks' Guild Apprentice, justo al norte del Easter Bunny.

text.en: Make the Cake of pies on the Cooks' Guild range.
text.es: Haz la Cake of pies en el horno del Cooks' Guild.

text.en: Bring an uncooked redberry pie, uncooked meat pie, and an uncooked apple pie.
text.es: Trae un pastel de bayas rojas sin cocinar, un pastel de carne sin cocinar y un pastel de manzana sin cocinar.

text.en: Talk to the Cooks' Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Cooks' Guild Apprentice.

chatOptions: 1 Here is the cake of pies.

text.en: Make a Lemon pie.
text.es: Prepara una Lemon pie.

text.en: Take a Luxury lemon from the crate.
text.es: Coge un Luxury lemon del cajón.

text.en: Create an Uncooked lemon pie by using the Luxury lemon on a pie shell.
text.es: Crea un Uncooked lemon pie usando el Luxury lemon en una base de pastel.

text.en: Cook the Uncooked lemon pie on the Cooks' Guild range.
text.es: Cocina el Uncooked lemon pie en el horno del Cooks' Guild.

text.en: Talk to the Cooks' Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Cooks' Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice, west of the Cooks' Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Crafting Guild Apprentice, al oeste del Cooks' Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Fill your empty pot with salt from the Barrel of salt by the Cooks' Guild Apprentice and head back to talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Llena tu olla vacía con sal del Barrel of salt junto al Cooks' Guild Apprentice y vuelve a hablar con el Crafting Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Heat the gold and pot of salt twice at the Crafting Guild's Furnace.
text.es: Calienta el oro y la olla de sal dos veces en el Furnace del Crafting Guild.

text.en: Talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Crafting Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Fill your bucket with vinegar from the Barrel of Vinegar by the Cooks' Guild Journeywoman.
text.es: Llena tu cubo con vinagre del Barrel of Vinegar junto al Cooks' Guild Journeywoman.

text.en: Talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Crafting Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Paint the egg at the Crafting Guild's Workbench nearby.
text.es: Pinta el huevo en el Workbench del Crafting Guild cercano.

text.en: Talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Crafting Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Use the Bag of flawless gems on the Unadorned imperial egg.
text.es: Usa la Bag of flawless gems en el Unadorned imperial egg.

text.en: Talk to the Crafting Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Crafting Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Talk to the Fishing Guild Apprentice, south of the Cooks' Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Fishing Guild Apprentice, al sur del Cooks' Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Talk to Ames the Courtier. He can be found northwest by the furnace.
text.es: Habla con Ames the Courtier. Se le puede encontrar al noroeste, junto al horno.

text.en: Get a Beautiful bucket of flowers.
text.es: Consigue un Beautiful bucket of flowers.

text.en: Go to the Lumbridge General Store.
text.es: Ve al Lumbridge General Store.

text.en: Talk to the Shopkeeper.
text.es: Habla con el Shopkeeper.

text.en: Talk to Ames the Courtier.
text.es: Habla con Ames the Courtier.

text.en: Talk to the Fishing Guild Apprentice.
text.es: Habla con el Fishing Guild Apprentice.

text.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny.
text.es: Habla con el Easter Bunny.
